scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tankquest/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tankquest/api
scripts.lint: eslint playwright.config.ts e2e && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run ai:lint
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run ai:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run ai-wheelhouse:verify && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run ai:test
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/api && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/web && npm run performance:check
